findings.title: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed
findings.evidence: computed root colorScheme='normal'; dark condition not separately captured in this batch.
findings.suggestedFix: Declare color-scheme support and provide a usable dark theme via prefers-color-scheme or light-dark().

principles.summary: Pending active keyboard/focus/input-modality test; screenshot/DOM evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending active wayfinding/search/menu-flow test; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
No issue found in this batch evidence.
Mobile layout showed no horizontal overflow.
Primary homepage entry point rendered; task completion flow not exercised.

findings.title: LCP above good threshold (7.2s)
findings.suggestedFix: Improve LCP by prioritizing the hero/content resource, reducing render-blocking work, and optimizing server/critical CSS delivery.

principles.summary: axe found 7 violation groups; Unnamed controls or links detected

findings.title: axe found 7 violation groups
findings.evidence: axe violations: color-contrast(serious,9 nodes), frame-title(serious,1 nodes), html-has-lang(serious,1 nodes), image-alt(critical,4 nodes), landmark-one-main(moderate,1 nodes), link-name(serious,3 nodes), region(moderate,49 nodes)
findings.suggestedFix: Fix the reported axe violations with semantic HTML, valid ARIA, accessible names, labels, and sufficient contrast.

findings.title: Unnamed controls or links detected
findings.suggestedFix: Give every interactive control/link a visible label or accurate accessible name.

principles.summary: Basic metadata/viewport probes and Lighthouse best-practices/SEO checks did not raise a finding.

findings.title: Lighthouse SEO score 82
findings.suggestedFix: Fix Lighthouse SEO failures such as crawlable links, metadata, status codes, and indexable content.

principles.summary: Network surface looked bounded in batch evidence (22 requests).
Pending active no-JS/offline/reload resilience test; manifest/service-worker presence alone is not treated as a pass.

findings.title: Missing document language
findings.suggestedFix: Set the correct html lang attribute and ensure locale-specific content uses appropriate language metadata.

principles.summary: Pending active consent/account/commerce-flow review for dark patterns; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending rigorous same-session memory audit; coarse heap snapshots are retained as evidence but not treated as pass/fail.

verdict: Homepage batch: 5 principles with issues; top concerns: high be-fast-and-stable: LCP above good threshold (7.2s); high be-inclusive: axe found 7 violation groups; medium respect-user-preferences: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed.
_caveats: Scale batch includes Lighthouse, trace, HAR, layout, screenshots, discoverability, axe/probes, and reduced-motion video; INP still requires a dedicated interaction flow.
Memory pass/fail requires rigorous_memory_pass.mjs; coarse heap snapshots are retained but not treated as pass/fail.
Dark-mode/reduced-motion are inferred from probes unless separately captured.
